purpose: Provide authenticated MMG operators a read-only release-health dashboard without exposing operational mutations, customer identifiers, credentials, provider payloads, or storage references to the browser.
display_contract: health signal values, states, reason codes, and sample counts
open incident severity, state, summary, timestamps, and version
latest consistency audit status and failed check codes
private_fields_excluded: raw test order or customer references
release_gates: The admin endpoint is routed behind an authenticated operator session.
The dashboard remains read-only and cannot call the internal mutation endpoint from the browser.
The component is inserted additively into the authenticated Admin Portal.
Unauthorized, empty, degraded, critical, and network-failure states pass QA.
Mobile, keyboard, focus-visible, screen-reader status, and reduced-motion behavior pass QA.
